nodes.label: Experience Manager
nodes.rationale: Achievements are stored as a plain string[] jsonb array because stable IDs are only needed for UI editing, not persistence; IDs are regenerated from index on load.

nodes.label: Stable ID Pattern for Array Editing
nodes.rationale: Using editable string values (or list indexes) as React keys destroys and recreates the input component on every keystroke, losing focus. Each list item gets a stable crypto.randomUUID() id used as the React key while only the value changes, so users can type continuously. Items are cloned with fresh IDs when opening the editor to avoid stale references.
